_comment: Capability/dependency manifest (single source of truth for optional deps). Read by shared/health/capabilities.py (the preflight) and the docs. Each capability is gated: it activates when its deps/bins/fonts/credentials are present and is honestly reported as a GAP when not — never faked. Tiers: builtin (stdlib, always on), local_optional (local lib/bin/font; no secrets; on when installed), cloud_optional (external SaaS; OFF by default; needs district opt-in + an API key read ONLY from the environment, never the repo; may send data off-site so it is bound by shared/students/student-data-policy.md + the connector restriction model). Supply chain: pin in the named requirements file, auto-update via .github/dependabot.yml, scan via tools/security_scan.py (pip-audit + bandit) in CI.

capabilities.beats_baseline: read large/complex PDFs (columns, layout, tables) with provenance
OCR scanned packets offline (multi-page, language packs)
create/edit REAL .pptx/.docx/.xlsx (not a description of one)
convert/render decks+docs to PDF/PNG for visual QA
transcribe audio/video offline (fills the docintel Transcriber contract)
polite web fetch + HTML parse beyond the chat window
high-fidelity 'convert any file to markdown' (15+ formats incl. zip iteration) via microsoft/markitdown — boosts the docintel universal reader
render ALL scripts (CJK, Arabic, Hebrew, emoji) + MS-metric fonts so documents read without tofu/substitution
capabilities.install: apt-get install fonts-liberation fonts-crosextra-carlito fonts-crosextra-caladea fonts-noto-core fonts-noto-cjk fonts-noto-color-emoji

capabilities.beats_baseline: managed speech-to-text (long-form, many languages, diarization)
capabilities.privacy: high — audio may leave the building; district opt-in + minimum-necessary

capabilities.beats_baseline: managed OCR + image captioning/object detection (20+ languages)
image / video / voice generation + editing/upscale
capabilities.privacy: high — do not send student PII to a generation API

capabilities.beats_baseline: convert/redact/sign/extract across PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/HTML/images; OCR 20+ langs; PII redaction

managed JS-rendered web crawl/extract (handles SPAs the polite stdlib crawler reports as js_required); AUTO-detected from FIRECRAWL_API_KEY (SaaS) or FIRECRAWL_BASE_URL (self-host) and preferred by the traversal web fetcher — no per-use setup
parse RSS/Atom feeds for source-currency 'what changed' monitoring; stdlib ElementTree fallback when feedparser is absent

resolve teacher-profile handoff ROLES to real people (case manager, AP, counselor) from an AUTHORIZED directory/connector or a teacher-provided list; polite public crawl only where robots.txt + ToS permit
capabilities.privacy: high — staff personal data (work email/role); OFF by default, authorized-first, minimum-necessary, gitignored local store. Bulk-harvesting public emails carries ToS/privacy risk — see shared/staff/staff-data-policy.md. Lookup of placeholder data needs no authorization; INGEST requires STAFF_INGEST_AUTHORIZED=true.

capabilities.beats_baseline: produce advanced NATIVE Google Docs/Sheets/Slides (lossless import + Apps Script automation via shared/office/google_bridge.py)
capabilities.privacy: high — Drive/Workspace content; district opt-in; live calls via host-AI native Google integration or a deployment Node runner (no OAuth client built here)

capabilities.beats_baseline: opt-in OFFLINE semantic recall over the L1 standards cache via sqlite-vec (paraphrase matches that keyword search misses); embeddings computed locally once and reused. Activated only with teacher consent (teacher-profile local_first.consents.local_semantic). Absent or declined => graceful fallback to L1 keyword search, reported as a gap — never faked. No data leaves the machine.
capabilities.privacy: low — local-only; vectors derived from PUBLIC standards text, no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: self-update from a tiered catalog of trusted education feeds (shared/feeds): polite conditional GET (304-skip), dedupe, local SQLite store, zero-token 'what's new' digest (tools/feeds_update.py); curated by the seed-curator (tools/seed_curator.py). stdlib-only; the optional 'read_feeds' (feedparser) capability just makes parsing nicer.
capabilities.privacy: low — public feed content only; advisory + human-reviewed; no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: parse RSS/Atom ~25x faster + more robustly on messy feeds (kagisearch/fastfeedparser, feedparser-compatible API) for shared/feeds + tools/verify_feeds.py; preferred over feedparser, which is preferred over the stdlib ElementTree fallback. Absent => stdlib still parses every feed.
capabilities.privacy: low — local parsing of public feed XML; no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: CSS-selector-based news extraction from sites without RSS (beautifulsoup4) — powers tools/make_feed.py and the type='page' path in shared/feeds/feeds.py; stdlib html.parser fallback always available but less precise. Use to build RSS-style feeds from FLDOE, OCPS, CPALMS, Monarch, and any other site missing a native feed.
capabilities.privacy: low — scrapes public education news pages only; no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: emit real RSS 2.0 / Atom XML from scraped items (feedgen library) for tools/make_feed.py --output-rss; lets TOS act as a feed publisher, not just a consumer. Absent => JSON output only (still importable by feeds_import.py).
capabilities.privacy: low — generates public feed metadata only; no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: LOCAL, offline-capable headless-browser render of JS-required SPA pages (e.g. CPALMS search) using the pre-installed Chromium at /opt/pw-browsers — NOT impersonation/evasion: same honest identifying User-Agent, robots.txt-respecting, just runs the site's own JavaScript the way a browser is meant to. Powers the render + screenshot prongs in shared/render/render_prongs.py and tools/render_fetch.py. Absent => the prong chain falls back to the offline-docintel parse of static HTML, then reports js_required honestly (never faked). Prefer this LOCAL prong over the cloud_web_crawl (firecrawl) prong when offline-first.
capabilities.privacy: low — renders public education pages locally; no data leaves the machine; no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: recursive site crawling (scrapy), stateful session handling (mechanize), transparent TTL-aware request caching (requests-cache), and HTML→PDF export (weasyprint) for full offline archival of public education sites — powers tools/standards_refresh.py deep crawl mode and full-site mirror downloads. Absent => requests + urllib stdlib crawl still works, just less capable.
capabilities.privacy: low — public sites only; all caching is local; no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: news-article extraction from any URL (newspaper4k), OPML/FOAF bundle parsing (listparser), and strict RFC-compliant feed validation (atoma) — turn any public news page into a structured feed item without manual scraping. Powers tools/make_feed.py article mode and shared/feeds autodiscovery. Absent => bs4 scrape_feed fallback still runs.
capabilities.privacy: low — public news/feed pages only; no student data

capabilities.beats_baseline: deep-learning OCR (easyocr / surya) + document layout analysis (layoutparser / unstructured) + table extraction (img2table / camelot) — recovers text and structure from scanned PDFs, complex multi-column layouts, handwritten notes, and image-heavy pages that tesseract misses; integrates with shared/docintel and shared/render prong chain. Absent => tesseract ocr capability still runs.
capabilities.privacy: low — offline processing of local documents; no content or student data sent anywhere
capabilities.note: default:off — large model downloads (~300 MB–1 GB); teacher opts in after storage check

capabilities.beats_baseline: cross-checks any current fetch against the most recent Wayback Machine snapshot (archive.org CDX API, free/no-auth) to confirm whether a page genuinely changed, was removed, or whether the current fetch is unreliable — raises confidence score on agreement, generates minority_report entry on discrepancy. Powers _wayback_compare() in shared/render/render_prongs.py. Absent => stdlib urllib fallback attempts the same CDX query.
capabilities.privacy: low — sends only the public page URL to archive.org CDX API; no page content; no student data
